prestazioni: Engine: S54B32 (3.2L I6) with a custom Schrick 288° camshaft kit (288° intake/280° exhaust, 11.5mm lift) paired with Ferrea +1mm oversized titanium valves, Supertech dual valve springs, and ARP head studs for 12.5:1 static compression. Forced induction via a Rotrex C38-91 supercharger (12psi peak) on a custom CSF intercooler with a 3.5" inlet pipe and a Vibrant 1482 resonator delete mid-pipe.

Drivetrain: OS Giken 1.5-way limited-slip differential with 40% lock under power, mated to a Getrag GS6-53BZ 6-speed manual transmission reinforced with a Fidanza aluminum flywheel (12.5lb) and a South Bend Stage 3 daily clutch. Custom 3.91:1 ratio rear differential gears from a Euro-spec E46 M3 for optimized acceleration.

Suspension/Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8-position rebound, 20-way compression damping) with Eibach 400lb/in front and 500lb/in rear springs. Polyurethane subframe bushings from 034 Motorsport, spherical bearing front control arms (Meyle HD), and a Hotchkis 22mm front sway bar with adjustable end links. Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (355mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (345mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Body: Custom widebody conversion using a Z3M Coupe rear quarter panels (flared 2.5" per side) and a custom carbon fiber front splitter from Vorsteiner (Z3-specific, 3" overhang). Rear diffuser from 3D Carbon with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3" titanium tips (Remus Valvetronic). Carbon fiber hardtop with a custom roll bar (Autopower bolt-in, 4-point) and a clear-coated weave finish.

Wheels/Tires: BBS LM-R (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +20 rear) with custom center locks (1/2" longer studs) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear). Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) from H&R to fill the fenders.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim (black with red stitching) by Euro Auto Top, including door cards, center console, and M-Tech 2 steering wheel. Custom gauge pod (AEM X-Series wideband, oil temp/pressure, and boost) mounted in the center vent. Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs) with Schroth 6-point harnesses and a bolt-in roll cage (Autopower, 8-point) painted in BMW Laguna Seca Blue.
